who: Fleet managers in logistics companies managing 10-50 vehicles
offer: For fleet managers in logistics companies processing 10-50 vehicles, inconsistent maintenance schedules cause unexpected breakdowns. We provide alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets or paper logs.
problem: Inconsistent vehicle maintenance schedules leading to unexpected breakdowns
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for fleet managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges
DM outreach to fleet managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for fleet management tools
try_it: Let users try maintenance tracking on 1-3 vehicles
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing maintenance data
